scripts.db:gen-types: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const t=execSync('supabase gen types typescript --local',{encoding:'utf8'});require('fs').writeFileSync('packages/shared/src/types/database.types.ts',t);require('fs').writeFileSync('supabase/functions/_shared/database.types.ts',t);console.log('Types generated.')"
